records.ety: [A name adopted by the Egyptian Gnostic Basilides, containing the Greek letters , , , , , , , which, as numerals, amounted to 365. It was used to signify the supreme deity as ruler of the 365 heavens of his system.]

defs: A mystical word used as a charm and engraved on gems among the ancients; also, a gem stone thus engraved.
